title: v5 review record
description: One isolated validator review per sampled attempt (sample membership is code-owned under the frozen sampling contract; unsampled records publish as not_reviewed), written to review.json in the run directory. The `mechanics` block is copied verbatim from `python3 pipeline/v5_1/build.py check <run_dir>` — the validator model never self-assesses byte reproduction. `build.py site` re-runs the check and rejects any review whose mechanics or artifacts_sha256 do not match the current bytes, so a review is bound to the exact artifacts it examined. A material finding must state the mechanism (which primitive or factor changes, in which direction) and pass the materiality test: correcting or downgrading the affected input would change the base tier or the action category. Findings without that are caveats.

mechanics.description: Verbatim output of build.py check (minus its errors list). Any false value forces outcome invalid.

sources_audited.description: Every source cited by any primitive (regardless of evidence state) must have exactly one audit entry; background sources may be labeled not_score_driving. Unknown or duplicate source_ids are rejected.

material_findings.description: Empty for both publishable outcomes; nonempty required for reject.

materiality.description: The mechanism and the materiality test result: which primitive/factor changes, direction, and why the base tier or action category would change.
